---
title: "Apple Shadyside, Old and New"
description: "I still remember September 4, 2004 — standing in line for the opening of the Apple Shadyside store while at CMU. Goodbye, old store. Welcome, new one."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-08-08"
categories: [Apple, CMU, history, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Apple Shadyside store. Photo: Benjamin Han. ([Source](https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~benhdj/Mac/index.html))](cover.jpg){width=480 fig-align="center"}

I still remember September 4, 2004, when my buddy at CMU and I stood in line for the opening of the Apple Shadyside store on Walnut Street!

Those were the days of the iPod and PowerBook G4: sometimes when walking back from campus to my apartment, I'd stop by the store just to admire all the shiny objects on display. 🙂

Goodbye, old Apple Shadyside store. Welcome, new Apple Shadyside store!

(My story with Mac, still up on CMU web: <https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~benhdj/Mac/index.html>)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_cmu-pittsburgh-applestore-ugcPost-7359718750645866497-wyM4).*
